summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RECRA Solutions CPQ Platform iteration 7. All new features verified working: 1) Click-to-place clears selectedProduct after placement (no duplicate placement), 2) Select placed product via mousedown shows green ring + rotate/delete controls, 3) Drag-move placed product repositions with 24px grid snapping (tested: moved from (790,322) to (982,466)), 4) Pointer drag from sidebar places product on canvas, 5) Scale calibration UI in Step 2 (only visible when floor plan uploaded) with 'Schaal instellen' label and meter-per-block input, 6) Deselect on empty canvas click removes selection ring and controls, 7) Icoon/2D toggle switches rendering mode, 8) Right sidebar shows 'Investering' and '60 mnd incl. SLA' labels, 9) Rotate/Delete controls positioned relative to product size.
passed_tests: Click-to-place: click product card shows 'Klik op het canvas om te plaatsen', click canvas places product, selectedProduct cleared after placement
No duplicate placement: after click-to-place, clicking canvas again does NOT place another product
Select placed product: mousedown on placed item selects it (green ring appears)
Rotate/Delete controls: appear next to selected product, positioned relative to product size in 2D mode
Delete functionality: clicking delete button removes product from canvas, shows 'Product verwijderd' toast
Drag-move placed product: mousedown + drag repositions item with 24px grid snapping (verified: moved from (790,322) to (982,466))
Pointer drag from sidebar: mousedown on drag handle, drag to canvas, mouseup places product
Deselect: clicking empty canvas area removes selection ring and hides rotate/delete controls
2D toggle: 'Icoon | 2D' toggle in toolbar switches product rendering mode
Scale calibration: 'Schaal instellen' section in Step 2 only visible when floor plan is uploaded
Scale calibration UI: shows meter-per-block input with data-testid='scale-input'
Right sidebar: '60 mnd incl. SLA' text visible
22 drag handles found on product cards (data-testid='drag-handle-{id}')
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 7 features verified working. Key features tested: 1) Click-to-place clears selectedProduct after placement - verified by checking 'Klik op het canvas om te plaatsen' message disappears after placement. 2) Select placed product via mousedown - clicking on placed item shows green selection ring and rotate/delete controls. 3) Drag-move placed product - mousedown on placed item, drag to new position, item repositions with 24px grid snapping. Tested movement from (790,322) to (982,466). 4) Pointer drag from sidebar - mousedown on drag handle (data-testid='drag-handle-{id}'), drag to canvas, mouseup places product. 5) Scale calibration - 'Schaal instellen' section only appears in Step 2 when floor_plan_base64 is truthy. Shows meter-per-block input (data-testid='scale-input') and canvas dimensions in meters. 6) Deselect - clicking empty canvas area clears selectedItem, hides rotate/delete controls. 7) Icoon/2D toggle - switches between icon and 2D rendering modes. 8) Right sidebar labels - 'Investering', 'Lease/mnd', '60 mnd incl. SLA' all visible. 9) Rotate/Delete controls - positioned next to selected product, delete removes item with toast message.
